office_does: The sheriff leads county law enforcement, jail operations, emergency response, and civil-process services.
race_blurb: Chief criminal deputy Ben Kokjer faces independent challenger Darryl Chepoda Jr., whose approved dossier contains filing-level information only.

candidates.summary: Kokjer is the chief criminal deputy with 21 years in the sheriff's office and experience across patrol, rescue, major crimes, training, and command.
highlights: Has 21 years in the sheriff's office across operational and command roles [S2].
Emphasizes rural coverage, offender accountability, professional treatment, and community trust [S2].

safety.basis: His priorities include in-person response, rural coverage, and offender accountability.

experience.basis: Twenty-one years in the office and current chief-criminal-deputy command establish a maximal proven record.

candidates.summary: Chepoda is an independent candidate whose approved dossier contains no identity-safe detailed biography or stable platform.
highlights: Official election material verifies his candidacy [S1].
